text: TCS NQT All India Batch 2026 Admit Card: TCS NQT All India Batch 2026 Registration Number DT20268012917 Candidate Name Sujal Vijay Patil Date of Birth 11-01-2004 Paste your photograph here **Clear photo is mandatory Exam Venue iON Digital Zone IDZ Powai to appear for the exam Aurum IT Park, Morarji nagar, near Hotel Ramada,Powai, Mumbai, Maharashtra, India - 400087 Date of Test Reporting Time Gate Closure Time Test Timing 21/Apr/2026 07:30 AM 08:30 AM 9:00 AM - 12:10 PM Candidate’s Signature (To be signed in the presence of the invigilator at the time of examination) BarCode Roll No: TAG264241836 Instructions – To Be Strictly Followed: 1) Please ensure you carry the following documents with you to the Test Center, on the day of exam: a) Printed copy of Admit Card (Pls note- A copy of the physical/hard copy of your Admit card is mandatory for admission into the examination venue). You must carry one photo and paste the same on the Hall ticket at the exam venue) b) Original Government issued Photo Identity proof for verification, such as Aadhaar Card / Driving License / Passport / Voter ID / PAN Card only. ID card with incomplete DOB details will not be considered valid. (Note: The ID card must have the complete DOB details, including date, month, and year.) 2) Report to the test centre well before the gate closure time, otherwise entry will NOT be permitted. 3) Prohibited Items: DO NOT wear any jewellery or other items containing metal. Bags, Mobile phones or any other electronic gadgets such as Smart watches, Digital Key, calculators and other electronic devices are strictly prohibited in the examination hall. There is no facility for safekeeping of your personal belongings outside the test hall and we are not responsible for its loss. Only Admit Card, original Photo ID Card & Photo will be allowed inside the test hall. 4) Unfair Means: Adoption of any unfair means in the examination hall will result in disqualification from the test and your scores will not be published. You will also not be able to participate in any subsequent selection process or tests. 5) Request for change of test centre will NOT be entertained. 6) Friends and relatives accompanying the candidate will NOT be allowed inside the test centre. You will NOT be permitted to appear for the Exam if you fail to carry the Admit Card, photo and/ or any one of the mandatory Government issued Photo Identity Card. Declaration: I hereby certify that I meet the eligibility criteria to take the test and the information furnished by me in the Registration/Application Form is factually correct and subject to verification by TCS. Later at any point in time

the candidate will NOT be allowed inside the test centre. You will NOT be permitted to appear for the Exam if you fail to carry the Admit Card, photo and/ or any one of the mandatory Government issued Photo Identity Card.
